target_market_label.zh: 土库曼斯坦（Turkmenstandartlary / 国家电力）
target_market_label.zht: 土庫曼斯坦（Turkmenstandartlary / 國家電力）

title.en: China-to-Turkmenistan Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入土库曼斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入土庫曼斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Turkmenistan Turkmenstandartlary conformity requirements, Turkmenenergo 220/380 V 50 Hz grid-connection acceptance, IEC 62109 safety evidence, IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 grid-interface evidence, IEC 61000 and IEC 62920 EMC evidence, and desert heat and dust derating — versus China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 baselines. Turkmenistan is not an EAEU member; EAC / TR CU certification is not the applicable route.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与土库曼斯坦Turkmenstandartlary合格评定要求、Turkmenenergo 220/380 V 50 Hz并网验收、IEC 62109安全证据、IEC 62116和IEC 61727电网接口证据、IEC 61000和IEC 62920 EMC证据，以及沙漠高温和粉尘降额——对比中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基准的差距对照。土库曼斯坦不是欧亚经济联盟成员；EAC / TR CU认证不是适用途径。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與土庫曼斯坦Turkmenstandartlary合格評定要求、Turkmenenergo 220/380 V 50 Hz併網驗收、IEC 62109安全證據、IEC 62116和IEC 61727電網介面證據、IEC 61000和IEC 62920 EMC證據，以及沙漠高溫和粉塵降額——對比中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024基準的差距對照。土庫曼斯坦不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員；EAC / TR CU認證不是適用途徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Turkmenstandartlary conformity scope determination, Turkmenenergo grid-connection approval, electrical-installation design, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, EPC contractors, and installers should verify current Turkmenistan conformity assessment rules, Turkmenenergo project requirements, IEC standard editions, desert heat and dust design assumptions, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Turkmenistan is not a member of the EAEU; EAC / TR CU certification confers no automatic market-access rights in Turkmenistan.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、Turkmenstandartlary合格评定范围裁定、Turkmenenergo并网批准、电气安装设计、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方、EPC承包商和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核验现行土库曼斯坦合格评定规则、Turkmenenergo项目要求、IEC标准版本、沙漠高温和粉尘设计假设及项目业主要求。土库曼斯坦不是欧亚经济联盟成员；EAC / TR CU认证在土库曼斯坦不赋予自动市场准入权利。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、Turkmenstandartlary合格評定範圍裁定、Turkmenenergo併網批准、電氣安裝設計、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方、EPC承包商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行土庫曼斯坦合格評定規則、Turkmenenergo項目要求、IEC標準版本、沙漠高溫和粉塵設計假設及項目業主要求。土庫曼斯坦不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員；EAC / TR CU認證在土庫曼斯坦不賦予自動市場准入權利。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Turkmenistan, the practical gates are: (1) domestic Turkmenstandartlary conformity assessment, not EAC / TR CU certification; (2) Turkmenenergo project and grid-connection acceptance on the state-controlled 220/380 V, 50 Hz network; (3) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence; (4) IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence; (5) IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC evidence; and (6) desert heat, dust, ingress-protection, and thermal-derating documentation. China GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 19964-2024 are useful engineering baselines but are not automatically accepted for Turkmenistan authority or project gates. The nominal grid voltage and frequency match China, but inverter firmware, protection thresholds, reactive-power settings, communications, and environmental derating must still be validated against Turkmenenergo and project-specific conditions.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口土库曼斯坦时，实际门槛包括：（1）国内Turkmenstandartlary合格评定，而不是EAC / TR CU认证；（2）在国家管控的220/380 V、50 Hz电网上取得Turkmenenergo项目和并网验收；（3）IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据；（4）IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口证据；（5）IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC证据；（6）沙漠高温、粉尘、防护等级和热降额文件。中国GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024可作为工程基准，但不会自动被土库曼斯坦主管机关或项目门槛接受。名义电网电压和频率与中国一致，但逆变器固件、保护阈值、无功设置、通信和环境降额仍须针对Turkmenenergo及项目具体条件验证。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口土庫曼斯坦時，實際門檻包括：（1）國內Turkmenstandartlary合格評定，而不是EAC / TR CU認證；（2）在國家管控的220/380 V、50 Hz電網上取得Turkmenenergo項目和併網驗收；（3）IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據；（4）IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網介面證據；（5）IEC 61000 / IEC 62920 EMC證據；（6）沙漠高溫、粉塵、防護等級和熱降額文件。中國GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004和GB/T 19964-2024可作為工程基準，但不會自動被土庫曼斯坦主管機關或項目門檻接受。名義電網電壓和頻率與中國一致，但逆變器韌體、保護閾值、無功設置、通訊和環境降額仍須針對Turkmenenergo及項目具體條件驗證。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
